BABS.RNASeq: BABS RNASeq pipeline

Source: R/babs.rnaseq-package.R
BABS.RNASeq-package.Rd

The helper functions for running a standard bulk RNASeq analysis.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://bioinformatics.thecrick.org/resources/info/babs-rnaseq

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/FrancisCrickInstitute/babs-template-rnaseq/issues
